title: 162  Our material existence is due to our enviousness towards Krishna
speaker: HH Stoka Krishna Maharaj

segments.text: Anybody who is not a pure devotee has got envy within his heart towards Krishna.
We may not know that, but our material existence is due to enviousness towards Krishna.
As soon as we become free from all envy towards Krishna, that is the end of our material existence.
That's why Bhagavatam says, Nirmatsaranam Satam.
Even Bhagavatam can be relished only by those who have become completely free from all envy,
because Bhagavatam is the exclusive glorification of Krishna.
So those who are envious of Krishna, they cannot relish the glories of Krishna.
So in order to relish the glories of Krishna, we have to become free from all envy.
His mercy upon Kalia in order to make Kalia free from all envy.
So Kalia became free from all envy because of Krishna's mercy.
So that will be described in detail in this particular pastime.
